name: Pfitzauf
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour, milk, eggs, salt, and sugar in a bowl.
2. Stir into a dough.
3. Mix in the melted butter.
4. Grease a Pfitzauf pan and fill halfway with the dough.
5. Bake in a hot oven for 25 minutes until light brown. Do not open the oven door during baking.
6. Dust with sugar and serve with stewed fruit.
(Note: A muffin pan lined with paper cupcake holders may also be used. The recipe specifies 400 degrees F.)
Serves 4.
